title: Non-trivial constructor parameters broken in inheritance hierarchies

features.name: interface class with pure virtual function
features.description: Code should include an interface class declaration with a pure virtual function method

features.name: class implements interface class
features.description: Code should include a class that implements an interface class

features.name: class extends class and implements interface
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a base class and implements an interface class (multiple inheritance)

features.name: constructor with string default parameter
features.description: Code should include a class constructor with a string type default parameter

features.name: super.new call in intermediate inheritance class
features.description: Code should include a super.new() call in a class that is part of an inheritance chain with interface implementations
